name: Cranberry Creme Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 1 can frozen cranberry juice cocktail (12 oz)
1 cup evaporated milk or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor until smooth.
2. Cover the mixture and chill overnight to allow flavors to blend.
3. Store the liqueur in a covered container in the refrigerator.
